ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Continued To Sep-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Serve Complaint By Electronic Mail Under Ccp 413.30; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Jack Burns, Esq. 619-338-6500 Sheppard for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'s Motion To Serve Complaint By Electronic Mail Under Ccp 413.30.

Off calendar. Per SF Local Rule 3.1C, plaintiff shall drop off an ex parte application to the Presiding Judge in Department 206 for the requested relief.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)
